creator: johan@loxley.se
text:
This is the relevant information I think, seems that the directory doesnt exist:

--->  Backing up the old version
--->  Uninstalling the old version
--->  Deinstalling 'lzma-4.57_1'
[Updating the pkgdb <format:bdb_btree> in /var/db/pkg ... - 297 packages found (-1 +0) (...) done]
--->  Installing the new version via the port
===>  Installing for lzma-4.58
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if archivers/lzma already installed
cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/archivers/lzma/work/DOC/
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/archivers/lzma.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/archivers/lzma.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade.81240.0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=lzma-4.57_1 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=4.57_1 make reinstall
--->  Restoring the old version
** Fix the installation problem and try again.
[Updating the pkgdb <format:bdb_btree> in /var/db/pkg ... - 298 packages found (-0 +1) . done]
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
